generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values security and stability, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events have shown that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about protecting them. Look at how other countries handle similar situations. They've found a balance between security and civil liberties, and so can we. It's time to update our laws to reflect the realities of today's world. #SecurityFirst #ModernizeOurLaws
